title: Halloween Biome
description: Adds a Halloween Themed Biome to your world, complete with haunted house, trick or treating and ghosts.
body:
Welcome to the Halloween Biome!

New biome adds a holloween ambiance with a spooky feel, new structures and a few new items and even trick-or-treating!

The mod is Vanilla freindly and plays well with other mods, including my other current holiday themed mods.

This is the initial release of this mod, just in time for Holloween 2024. If it is popular enough, I'll add more content in the future.

Dependencies: NONE (But I highly recomend Dynamic Pumpkin Carving!

Mod pack dev's

You may use this in your modpacks as long as due credit is given. This mod does not alter vanilla recipes, loot tables or drops in any way and is safe to use with other mods.
